## ExtraParams.values property

(Required) A Dictionary where the keys are the extra param names and its values.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
values: Dictionary<unknown>;
```

## Remarks

Emits the [ExtraParamsXEvents.ExtraParamsProvided](./x-components.extraparamsxevents.extraparamsprovided.md) when the component is rendered or the values changed.
